svg.title: Approve Vessel Visit Notification - Process View

g.text: Approve Vessel Visit Notification - Process View
Officer assigns a dock and approves\nnotification for vessel arrival.
throws BusinessRuleViolationException("Only pending notifications can be approved")
SELECT * FROM VesselVisitNotifications WHERE DockAssignment = ? AND ...time overlap...
showError("Dock already booked for the selected period")
Updates notification to Approved\nand logs officer and timestamp
